description_long: This is an electric guitar with a classic double-cutaway body shape, finished in a white or cream color. The body features a contoured design with a pickguard and visible control knobs, likely for volume and tone adjustment. The neck is made of a lighter wood and is attached to the body with a bolt-on joint, while the headstock is angled and fitted with tuning pegs. The guitar is displayed upright on a metal stand with a wooden base, which supports it securely. The back of the guitar shows a rectangular electronics cavity cover, and the overall design is reminiscent of iconic Stratocaster-style instruments. The visible strings, pickups, and hardware suggest it is a fully functional electric guitar suitable for urban performances or street music scenes.
description: A white double-cutaway electric guitar with a contoured body, visible pickguard, and control knobs, displayed upright on a metal stand with a wooden base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white body, pickguard, control knobs, and the full neck with headstock.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the guitar's thickness, the curve of the body, and the stand's support arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the electronics cavity cover and the bolt-on neck joint.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the body contour and the side profile of the neck and headstock.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, standard contour
